channel.title: Releases on StageSet Controller
channel.description: Recent content in Releases on StageSet Controller

item.title: Upgrading
item.description: This page lists the actions required when upgrading stageset-controller. Each release that needs action gets a section below, headed by its calendar version; a release with no section needs no migration — a plain upgrade (bump the chart’s appVersion or pull the new image tag) suffices.
